scripts.build:win: node scripts/sync-env.js && powershell -Command "if (-not (Test-Path dist)) { New-Item -Path dist -ItemType Directory | Out-Null }; npx -y minify index.html | Out-File -FilePath dist/index.html -Encoding utf8; Get-ChildItem -Path . -File | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne 'index.html' -and $_.Name -ne 'package-lock.json' -and $_.Name -ne 'package.json' -and -not $_.Name.StartsWith('.') -and $_.Extension -ne '.log' -and $_.Name -ne 'Expense Tracker.code-workspace' } | ForEach-Object { Copy-Item $_.FullName -Destination dist/ -Force }; Get-ChildItem -Path . -Directory | Where-Object { @('node_modules','.git','dist','www','.firebase','.wrangler','android') -notcontains $_.Name } | ForEach-Object { Copy-Item $_.FullName -Destination dist -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Get-ChildItem -Path dist -Directory -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { @('node_modules','.git','.wrangler','.next') -contains $_.Name } | ForEach-Object { Remove-Item $_.FullName -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"
